title: Pahalgam-Like Attack in Mira Road? Who is Jaib Zubair Ansari, US-Returned Man Arrested for Attacking Guards Over ‘Kalma’ Refusal
description: Jaib Zubair Ansari, a Mumbai-based science graduate who returned from the US in 2019 after reportedly failing to secure stable employment, lived an isolated life while teaching online chemistry classes and had recently been asked by his landlord to vacate his flat in Mira Road.
